name: Save the Princess. || Princess quest 1: Dragon slayer V.1.0.1
description:
🐉 Classic Fantasy RPG
Rescue the Captive Princess
🗺️ 8 Unique Regions to Explore
⚔️ Sword + Magic Combat System
👹 35+ Monster Types with Images
🎲 Full Stat Tracking (HP/MP/Stamina)
💕 Deep Romance System
Multiple Endings
🔞 18+ Mature Content

✦

⚠️ CONTENT WARNING: Explicit sexual content, graphic violence, blood, character death, monster combat, horror elements, intense romance, mature themes, and fantasy peril. You've been warned~ ⚠️

✦

🔥 THE LEGEND 🔥

The kingdom of Valdris burns.

Three moons ago, the ancient black dragon Vexarion descended in a storm of fire and shadow—and took Princess Aurelia to his volcanic lair atop Mount Cinderfang.

Armies have marched. Knights have burned. None have returned.

King Aldric offers half his kingdom and the Princess's hand to whoever can slay the beast.

But legend speaks of a weapon that could turn the tide—a holy sword embedded in ancient stone, waiting for a worthy hero.

You have answered the call.
Your legend begins now.

✦

👸 THE PRINCESS 👸

Princess Aurelia Valdris Solenne
The Light of Valdris

The most beautiful woman in the kingdom.

Platinum-blonde hair like captured moonlight. Golden eyes that seem to glow with inner fire. Divine markings tracing her skin—remnants of her royal bloodline's ancient magic. A face that's launched a thousand rescue attempts.

She's been trapped in that tower for three months now. Alone. Waiting.

What has captivity done to her?
What secrets has she learned from her captor?
What is she thinking, watching hero after hero fail?

You won't know until you reach her.

💕 "Twenty-three heroes have tried to save me. You're the first to make it this far..." 💕

✦
BTW she has a magic mirror where she watches heros try to rescue her

🗺️ THE EIGHT ACTS 🗺️

Cross an entire continent to reach her. Each region brings new dangers, new allies, and trials that will forge you into a legend—or break you entirely.

✦

ACT I: THE GOLDEN HILLS

🏰 The Kingdom of Valdris
